description_long: This coupe car features a compact, streamlined body with a two-door configuration and a classic notchback roofline. The exterior is finished in a two-tone color scheme, with a deep maroon hood, trunk, and lower side panels contrasting against a light gray upper body and roof. The car has a set of four wheels, with visible hubcaps and black tires, and side mirrors extending from both front doors. The front grille is simple, with a license plate and a small emblem at the center, while the rear includes a rectangular license plate area and subtle tail lights. The windows are tinted and the side profile reveals a gently sloping roofline that merges into the trunk, typical of coupe designs. The overall appearance suggests a late 20th-century European or Japanese coupe, suitable for urban driving and parking.
description: A two-tone coupe car with a maroon and gray exterior, two doors, and a classic notchback roofline. Features include tinted windows, simple front and rear grilles, and a compact, streamlined body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the maroon hood, simple grille, license plate, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door configuration, maroon lower panels, and sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the maroon trunk, rectangular license plate area, and subtle tail lights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the two-door layout, maroon lower panels, and coupe silhouette.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
